# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_version: "1.1"
services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-microservice.local
    routes:
      - name: user-api
        paths:
          - /user
        strip_path: true
        protocols: 
          - http
          - https
    healthchecks:
      threshold: 3
      active:
        concurrency: 10
        http_path: "/healthcheck"
        https_verify_certificate: true
    retries: 5

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-microservice.local
    routes:
      - name: order-api
        paths:
          - /order
        strip_path: true
        protocols: 
          - http
          - https
    healthchecks:
      threshold: 3
      active:
        concurrency: 10
        http_path: "/healthcheck"
        https_verify_certificate: true
    retries: 5

upstreams:
  - name: user-microservice
    targets:
      - target: user-microservice.local:8000
        weight: 100
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none

  - name: order-microservice
    targets:
      - target: order-microservice.local:8000
        weight: 100
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
